tree.name: Tree
tree.examine: A leafy tree, humming Syla's part very quietly.

willow.name: Willow tree
willow.examine: A weeping willow trailing its branches in the breeze.

stump.name: Tree stump
stump.examine: Somebody chopped this tree down and left the apology unsaid.

rocks_copper.name: Copper rocks
rocks_copper.examine: A copper vein — the opening bar of Aulden's bass line.

rocks_tin.name: Tin rocks
rocks_tin.examine: A tin vein. Bronze is a duet, and this is half of it.

rocks_iron.name: Iron rocks
rocks_iron.examine: An iron vein, stubborn and sensible, like everything made from it.

rocks_coal.name: Coal rocks
rocks_coal.examine: A dark seam of coal runs through this rock.

rocks_essence.name: Essence rocks
rocks_essence.examine: A pale rock thrumming with raw magic. It never seems to run dry.

rocks_mithril.name: Mithril rocks
rocks_mithril.examine: A vein glinting pale blue in the dark.

rocks_adamantite.name: Adamantite rocks
rocks_adamantite.examine: A vein of green-flecked adamantite. Bring a good pick and patience.

rocks_empty.name: Rocks
rocks_empty.examine: There is no ore left in this rock.

fishing_spot.name: Fishing spot
fishing_spot.examine: The water flickers silver. Brell is feeling generous.

rod_fishing_spot.name: Fishing spot
rod_fishing_spot.examine: Ripples here suggest fish with a taste for bait.

range.name: Cooking range
range.examine: A hot cooking range. It forgives nothing — Edda's first lesson.

bank_booth.name: Bank booth
bank_booth.examine: A Vaultwright booth. The vault behind it is tuned, stasis-kept, and identical everywhere, by oath.

furnace.name: Furnace
furnace.examine: Hot enough to turn rocks into regrets — or bars.

anvil.name: Anvil
anvil.examine: An anvil. It has heard a lot of hammering.

spinning_wheel.name: Spinning wheel
spinning_wheel.examine: Spins wool and flax into useful things.

altar.name: Altar
altar.examine: A quiet altar. It keeps the pitch; you bring the hum.

air_altar.name: Air altar
air_altar.examine: A weathered stone circle where Quiess never quite stops breathing.

flax_plant.name: Flax
flax_plant.examine: A clump of flax with delicate blue flowers.

farming_patch.name: Farming patch
farming_patch.examine: A patch of soil ready for honest work.

workbench.name: Workbench
workbench.examine: A sturdy bench for building furniture.

agility_log.name: Log balance
agility_log.examine: A log laid across a muddy gap. Probably fine.

agility_wall.name: Climbing wall
agility_wall.examine: A rough wall with convenient handholds.

agility_ledge.name: Narrow ledge
agility_ledge.examine: A ledge best crossed without looking down.

snare_caught.name: Bird snare
snare_caught.examine: Something small and feathery has been caught!

ge_booth.name: Aldgate Exchange booth
ge_booth.examine: Where fortunes are made, lost, and argued about.

slot_machine.name: Slot machine
slot_machine.examine: Three reels, one lever, and the faint smell of false hope.

blackjack_table.name: Blackjack table
blackjack_table.examine: Green felt, stiff cards, and a dealer who never blinks.

roulette_table.name: Roulette table
roulette_table.examine: A spinning wheel that treats probability like a personal insult.

coinflip_pedestal.name: Coinflip pedestal
coinflip_pedestal.examine: Challenge another adventurer to a fair flip. Heads you win, tails you learn.

hedon_bar.name: Hedon bar
hedon_bar.examine: Sticky countertops and excellent decisions waiting to happen.

dance_floor.name: Dance floor
dance_floor.examine: The tiles remember every questionable move ever attempted here.

hot_tub.name: Hot tub
hot_tub.examine: Bubbling water hot enough to melt bad decisions into stories.

disco_ball.name: Disco ball
disco_ball.examine: A thousand tiny mirrors judging your rhythm.

rainbow_banner.name: Rainbow banner
rainbow_banner.examine: Six stripes of courage hung where everyone can see them.

pride_fountain.name: Pride fountain
pride_fountain.examine: Water arcs in every colour. Coins at the bottom carry wishes.

pride_stage.name: Pride stage
pride_stage.examine: A small stage with very large feelings.

larp_pride_sign.name: LARP pride sign
larp_pride_sign.examine: Black Monkey LARP Pride update — foam swords, rainbow flags, zero shame.

larp_campfire.name: LARP campfire
larp_campfire.examine: Smoke and dramatic backstory rise together.

foam_weapon_rack.name: Foam weapon rack
foam_weapon_rack.examine: Rubber blades that thunk instead of cut.

monkey_totem.name: Monkey totem
monkey_totem.examine: A chimp knight carved in black-painted oak, cape fluttering in imagined wind.

black_pride_banner.name: Black pride banner
black_pride_banner.examine: Jet-black fabric edged in rainbow thread — LARP pride edition.

chimperton_throne.name: Chimperton throne
chimperton_throne.examine: Gilded seat fit for Danquavious Chimperton III and his magnificent ego.

chimperton_statue.name: Chimperton statue
chimperton_statue.examine: Bronze likeness of the Third. The banana is anatomically generous.

chimperton_plaque.name: Chimperton plaque
chimperton_plaque.examine: Danquavious Chimperton III update — read the inscription.

golden_banana_pedestal.name: Golden banana pedestal
golden_banana_pedestal.examine: A sacred banana under glass. Peeling forbidden by royal decree.

dentist_chair.name: Dentist chair
dentist_chair.examine: Leather recliner with excellent lumbar support and mild existential dread.

tick_aquarium.name: Tick aquarium
tick_aquarium.examine: Ticks swim in brine behind glass. Glen calls it the tasting tank.

dental_lamp.name: Dental lamp
dental_lamp.examine: Blinding white light for finding cavities and regretting life choices.

tick_nest.name: Tick nest
tick_nest.examine: Fresh ticks awaiting the Dentist Tick Eat update's daily special.

fountain.name: Fountain
fountain.examine: The pride of the Aldgate plaza. Coins at the bottom, hopes attached.

stalagmite.name: Stalagmite
stalagmite.examine: A stone spike, patiently growing upward for centuries.

cave_mouth.name: Cave mouth
cave_mouth.examine: A dark opening breathing cool air from somewhere deep below.

maple.name: Maple tree
maple.examine: A maple tree wearing autumn all year round.

yew.name: Yew tree
yew.examine: An ancient yew. It has outlived everyone who planted it.

magic_tree.name: Magic tree
magic_tree.examine: Its leaves glitter. The tree pretends not to notice.

rocks_gold.name: Gold rocks
rocks_gold.examine: A vein winking with honest-to-goodness gold.

rocks_runite.name: Runite rocks
rocks_runite.examine: Storm-grey ore in the living rock. The rarest of finds.

rocks_gem.name: Gem rocks
rocks_gem.examine: A rough seam glittering with buried colour.

lobster_spot.name: Fishing spot
lobster_spot.examine: The water here churns with armoured tempers.

harpoon_spot.name: Fishing spot
harpoon_spot.examine: Big shapes glide beneath the surface. Bring a harpoon.

fire_altar.name: Fire altar
fire_altar.examine: A scorched Sarrash choir-stone. Five centuries on, it still takes the verse.

ice_ledge.name: Icy ledge
ice_ledge.examine: A glassy ledge with no patience for hesitation.

rope_bridge.name: Rope bridge
rope_bridge.examine: Two ropes, some planks, and a long view down.

snow_slope.name: Snow slope
snow_slope.examine: A steep slope of packed snow. Gravity offers a shortcut.

fern.name: Fern
fern.examine: A fern that predates most kingdoms and all of their taxes.

boulder_small.name: Boulder
boulder_small.examine: A boulder that rolled here once and called it a day.

mushroom_patch.name: Mushrooms
mushroom_patch.examine: A huddle of mushrooms holding a quiet meeting.

reeds.name: Reeds
reeds.examine: Reeds whispering gossip to the wind.

lilypad.name: Lilypad
lilypad.examine: A frog's idea of prime real estate.

driftwood.name: Driftwood
driftwood.examine: Wood that took the scenic route here.

crate.name: Crate
crate.examine: A crate marked "this side up", lying on its side.

cactus.name: Cactus
cactus.examine: It waves hello. Do not wave back.

ice_spike.name: Ice spike
ice_spike.examine: A frozen spear the mountain made all by itself.

snow_pine.name: Snowy pine
snow_pine.examine: A pine wearing more snow than it can politely carry.

dead_tree_deco.name: Dead tree
dead_tree_deco.examine: It gave up leaves years ago and never looked back.

chair.name: Chair
chair.examine: A wooden chair. It has supported worse.

table.name: Table
table.examine: A sturdy table. Many elbows, one purpose.

bed.name: Bed
bed.examine: A bed. Adventurers wake up elsewhere; it tries not to take that personally.

bookshelf.name: Bookshelf
bookshelf.examine: Shelves groaning under the weight of books.

banner.name: Banner
banner.examine: A colourful banner. Unlike goblin banners, purely decorative.

rug_deco.name: Rug
rug_deco.examine: A woven rug. It really ties the room together.

cauldron.name: Cauldron
cauldron.examine: A black iron cauldron. Not currently brewing anything it will admit to.

hay_bale.name: Hay bale
hay_bale.examine: A bale of hay. A needle's favourite hiding place.

waystone.name: Waystone
waystone.examine: A road-shrine of the Five. Travellers hum a bar of the Chord at it and walk on in better tune.

brazier.name: Brazier
brazier.examine: A scorched iron brazier. Borrowed Imber, retail size.

millstone.name: Millstone
millstone.examine: A great grinding stone. Aulden lends the patience; the wind does the work.

beacon_brazier.name: Beacon brazier
beacon_brazier.examine: Whale-oil and Imber's goodwill. Ships in the strait steer by it.

cellar_door.name: Cellar door
cellar_door.examine: A heavy iron-banded door to the manor cellar. Locked — and recently oiled. Someone still uses it.

quiess_chime.name: Bone chimes
quiess_chime.examine: Pale chimes that ring with no wind. Quiess only listens to music.

rocks_ringing.name: Ringing vein
rocks_ringing.examine: The ore hums a half-beat flat under the pick. Mining it feels like arguing with a bell.

mine_ladder.name: Mine ladder
mine_ladder.examine: Duchy timber, '88 pattern. Knock twice before you trust it.

mine_rope.name: Knotted rope
mine_rope.examine: The knots are tied in work-song rhythm. The last knot is tied wrong on purpose.

mine_exit_portal.name: Breach light
mine_exit_portal.examine: Daylight from the Swamp Mine breach, folded down the shaft. Step through to leave the wing.

mine_plaque.name: Surveyor's plaque
mine_plaque.examine: Brigh's slate of record: the fastest descents into the Untuned Mine, in her best chisel-hand.

crystal_node.name: Sour crystal
crystal_node.examine: It glows the colour of a note played wrong on purpose.

guild_vault.name: Guild vault
guild_vault.examine: A banded strongbox tuned to one guild's chord. It only opens for members.

wheat_field.name: Wheat
wheat_field.examine: Tall grain, nodding along to Syla's part. Pick a sheaf; it grows back out of spite.

untuned_mine_door.name: Sealed gallery
untuned_mine_door.examine: Mine masonry, laid fast and laid well — with the trowel marks on this side facing the wrong way.

resonance_stand.name: Resonance stand
resonance_stand.examine: A music stand of black stone, older than the mine around it. It is waiting to be given the pitch.

conductors_lectern.name: Conductor's lectern
conductors_lectern.examine: A travelling lectern in Sarrash temple silk. The dust around it is disturbed in the shape of nothing at all.

smuggler_crate.name: Smuggler crate
smuggler_crate.examine: Labelled 'MISC. EEL'. The eel, if any, is miscellaneous indeed.
